summary: First test of Coach Portal (Phase 1). All 12 backend tests pass. All major frontend flows verified: landing page, login, dashboard, player search, player profile, board, settings, logout, auth protection, player-side app.

ui_bugs.issue: Quick Stats show '...' (loading dots) instead of actual numbers — stats may not be resolving after initial load
Recommended Players section shows empty loading placeholders — no player cards rendered (message 'Set your recruiting preferences to see personalised match scores' shown as prompt, which is correct)
Save to Board button not found on player profile page via selector 'button:has-text(Save)' — may be a selector issue or button label differs

issues: Stats area shows animated dots ('...') during loading and may stay that way if API returns empty data — should show 0 as fallback

action_items: Verify Save to Board button is visible/accessible on /coach/players/:userId profile page — may need label check
Verify Quick Stats numbers resolve after dashboard API loads (not stuck on loading state)
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard stats showing '...' suggests the API response may be returning empty/null stats and UI doesn't fallback to 0

success_rate.frontend: 90% — all pages load and navigate correctly; minor issues with stats display and Save button visibility on profile

seed_data_creation: None — used existing testcoach@courtbound.edu account with Daniel Orodje already saved
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach Portal Phase 1 is working end-to-end. All routes render, auth works (login/logout/protected routes), board shows 4 kanban columns with saved player. Settings page has profile+preferences form. Minor: stats may show loading dots on dashboard, Save button on player profile page needs label verification. Player-side app (/login) is unaffected.
